content.rendered:
[vc_row enable_overlay=”yes” el_class=”innerTitleBanner” css=”.vc_custom_1729616968209{background-image: url(https://localhost:3000/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/SV-4.webp?id=62947) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}” overlay_bg=”rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2)”][vc_column][vc_column_text]

YOUR DESTINATION for
PERSONALIZED HAIR CARE

 

With a deep commitment to creativity and personalized service, our team combines years of experience and skill to deliver exceptional hair care. We take pride in helping you express your unique style while ensuring you feel confident and beautiful every day.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”aboutText”][vc_column][vc_column_text el_class=”justifyText”]

ABOUT US

At Groove Unisex Salon, we are excited to breathe new life into this well-established Innsifil salon location, with some of the new and some of the resident experienced professionals. While the name may have changed, our commitment to providing exceptional hair services remains stronger than ever. Backed by years of experience and a portfolio of other successful salons, our team of dedicated professionals brings a wealth of knowledge and expertise to every appointment.

Our passion for hairstyling and commitment to excellence have been at the heart of our success. We strive to create a warm, welcoming environment where every client feels valued and cared for. Whether you’re a new client or a familiar face, our mission is to help you achieve your perfect look, combining the latest techniques with a personalized touch.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row enable_overlay=”yes” el_class=”innerTitleBanner” css=”.vc_custom_1729531011810{background-image: url(https://localhost:3000/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/SV-45.webp?id=62820) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}” overlay_bg=”rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)”][vc_column][vc_column_text]

OUR HAIR
STUDIO

Located at Sr.no 71/1, Varad Complex, Grant Rd, Thornton, Groove Unisex Salon is a premier destination for professional hair care in the Kharadi, Pune area. Our salon offers a comfortable, modern setting where clients can relax and enjoy a full range of hair services. Conveniently situated at the corner of Grant Rd, Kharadi and Highway 27, we provide ample parking and easy access for all visitors. Whether you’re here for a quick trim or a full transformation, our studio is designed to make you feel at home.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”ourPhotographers”][vc_column width=”1/4″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/2″][vc_column_text]

Groove Salon Specialists

& Stylists Team

[/vc_column_text][vc_separator color=”chino” el_width=”20″][vc_column_text]

At Groove Unisex Salon, our talented team of hairstylists is the heart of what we do. With years of experience and a passion for creativity, each member of our team is dedicated to delivering personalized hair care that suits your individual style.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/4″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]

meet the experts
BEHIND THE CHAIR

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row content_placement=”middle” el_class=”teamRow”][vc_column width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”63144″ alignment=”center” onclick=”custom_link”][vc_column_text]

JADEN NOBLE

Hair Stylist

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”63413″ alignment=”center” onclick=”custom_link”][vc_column_text]

Briana

Hair Stylist

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

We take pride in helping you express your unique style […]
